title: Junior Business Development Manager at K Raheja Corp

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at K Raheja Corp
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
